summary:
Testicular torsion requires urgent surgery; explore only the affected side initially. Delay can lead to tissue loss, so act swiftly without routine assessment of the other testicle unless symptoms suggest it too.
```

``` Summary: Immediate exploratory surgery is essential for the affected side due to time-critical nature of testicular torsion; avoid routine exploration of the healthy side until necessary based on findings.
